claims.text: Patient 31 (male, age 28 at genetic analysis, onset age 10, most severe symptom syncope) carries RYR2 c.14174a>g (p.Y4725C) located in the C-terminal domain, confirmed de novo by trio testing, with both parents phenotypically unaffected (none).

citations.quote: 31 | M | 28 | 10 | syncope | 14174a>g | Y4725C | CT | Trio | de novo | none | none
